svg.title: Antibiotic timeline 1940–2024 with resistance, polymyxin reintroduction, and cephalosporin generations
svg.desc: Horizontal timeline. Above axis (coral): 10 resistance emergence events from penicillinase 1945 through MCR-1 2015, including erm(B) macrolide resistance 1956 and aminoglycoside-modifying enzymes (AMEs) 1965. Below axis (teal): 15 antibiotic class introductions plus polymyxin reintroduction (1999, hollow marker). A separate lane below the main timeline shows the cephalosporin generation progression from 1st (Cephalothin 1964) through 5th (Ceftaroline 2010). The 1987–2000 discovery void is shaded.
